posts.author: TPL (James Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I am trying to set up an integration with Twilio to send an sms on status change or button click to our clients. I have everything set up with the exception of the ‘To’ in the Twilio integration as the mirror column from the client information board does not show as an option. Is there a workaround for this? There are multiple clients phone numbers per item and I want to be able to send batch SMS messages to them.

Thanks in advance
